description: Used to diagnose climate and air quality responses to the regionally heterogeneous evolution of anthropogenic non-CH4 SLCF emissions. Anthropogenic non-CH4 tropospheric O3 precursor emissions (NMVOCs, CO, NOx), aerosols, and aerosol precursor emissions (BC, OC, NH3, SO2) evolve as in `piControl`. All other forcings evolve as in `historical`. Requires interactive chemistry. Models without interactive chemistry should run `hist-piAer` instead. (Renamed from `hist-piNTCF` in AerChemMIP phase 1.)
